author: y4rr
content: Done. Three small refinements applied to rust-fix-discipline: (1) §7 Call-site impact now includes a 'Canonical command shape' template that callers can copy verbatim — only Symbol and workspace path change. (2) §4 Coordination boundaries now explicitly calls out shared error enums (e.g., FerrotorchError) as particularly sensitive — adding a variant changes every consumer's pattern-matching surface; even _ => fallback arms can change behavior; treat new variants as requiring cross-crate decision + workspace-wide audit. (3) §6 now has a '#[non_exhaustive] is a workspace-build event' subsection covering both struct (breaks struct-literal) and enum (breaks exhaustive match) cases, with type-specific grep templates.
